name: Fry's P'nutty Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream butter and shortening in a large mixing bowl until light.
3. Gradually beat in brown and granulated sugars.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla.
5. Blend in dry ingredients.
6. Stir in peanut butter chips and peanuts.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough, 2 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheets; flatten slightly with the back of a spoon.
8. Bake in a 375°F (190°C) oven for 7 to 8 minutes.
9. Cool on sheets for 1 to 2 minutes; remove from sheets and cool completely.
